import React, { createContext, useContext } from "react";
import { useLocalStorage } from "@/hooks/useLocalStorage";

export type Language = "uz" | "ru" | "en";

const translations = {
  // Settings
  settings: { uz: "Sozlamalar", ru: "╨¥╨░╤ü╤é╤Ç╨╛╨╣╨║╨╕", en: "Settings" },
  account: { uz: "Akkount", ru: "╨É╨║╨║╨░╤â╨╜╤é", en: "Account" },
  email: { uz: "Email", ru: "╨¡╨╗. ╨┐╨╛╤ç╤é╨░", en: "Email" },
  appearance: { uz: "Ko'rinish", ru: "╨₧╤ä╨╛╤Ç╨╝╨╗╨╡╨╜╨╕╨╡", en: "Appearance" },
  darkMode: { uz: "Qorong'u rejim", ru: "╨ó╤æ╨╝╨╜╨░╤Å ╤é╨╡╨╝╨░", en: "Dark mode" },
  security: { uz: "Xavfsizlik", ru: "╨æ╨╡╨╖╨╛╨┐╨░╤ü╨╜╨╛╤ü╤é╤î", en: "Security" },
  securityDesc: {
    uz: "Akkount email orqali himoyalangan",
    ru: "╨É╨║╨║╨░╤â╨╜╤é ╨╖╨░╤ë╨╕╤ë╤æ╨╜ ╨┐╨╛ ╤ì╨╗. ╨┐╨╛╤ç╤é╨╡",
    en: "Account protected via email",
  },
  logout: { uz: "Chiqish", ru: "╨Æ╤ï╨╣╤é╨╕", en: "Log out" },
  loggedOut: { uz: "Chiqildi", ru: "╨Æ╤ï ╨▓╤ï╤ê╨╗╨╕", en: "Logged out" },
  loggedOutDesc: { uz: "Muvaffaqiyatli chiqdingiz", ru: "╨Æ╤ï ╤â╤ü╨┐╨╡╤ê╨╜╨╛ ╨▓╤ï╤ê╨╗╨╕", en: "Successfully logged out" },
  language: { uz: "Til", ru: "╨»╨╖╤ï╨║", en: "Language" },
  privacy: { uz: "Maxfiylik", ru: "╨Ü╨╛╨╜╤ä╨╕╨┤╨╡╨╜╤å╨╕╨░╨╗╤î╨╜╨╛╤ü╤é╤î", en: "Privacy" },
  privateAccount: { uz: "Yopiq akkaunt", ru: "╨ù╨░╨║╤Ç╤ï╤é╤ï╨╣ ╨░╨║╨║╨░╤â╨╜╤é", en: "Private account" },
  privateAccountDesc: {
    uz: "Faqat kuzatuvchilar postlaringizni ko'rsin",
    ru: "╨ó╨╛╨╗╤î╨║╨╛ ╨┐╨╛╨┤╨┐╨╕╤ü╤ç╨╕╨║╨╕ ╨╝╨╛╨│╤â╤é ╨▓╨╕╨┤╨╡╤é╤î ╨▓╨░╤ê╨╕ ╨┐╨╛╤ü╤é╤ï",
    en: "Only followers can see your posts",
  },
  hideOnline: { uz: "Onlaynlikni yashirish", ru: "╨í╨║╤Ç╤ï╤é╤î ╨╛╨╜╨╗╨░╨╣╨╜-╤ü╤é╨░╤é╤â╤ü", en: "Hide online status" },
  hideOnlineDesc: {
    uz: "Boshqalar online holatni ko'rmasin",
    ru: "╨ö╤Ç╤â╨│╨╕╨╡ ╨╜╨╡ ╤â╨▓╨╕╨┤╤Å╤é ╨▓╨░╤ê ╨╛╨╜╨╗╨░╨╣╨╜-╤ü╤é╨░╤é╤â╤ü",
    en: "Others won't see your online status",
  },
  hideHighlights: { uz: "Hikoya lentani yashirish", ru: "╨í╨║╤Ç╤ï╤é╤î ╤à╨░╨╣╨╗╨░╨╣╤é╤ï", en: "Hide highlights" },
  hideHighlightsDesc: {
    uz: "Profildan highlights ko'rinmasin",
    ru: "╨Ñ╨░╨╣╨╗╨░╨╣╤é╤ï ╨╜╨╡ ╨▒╤â╨┤╤â╤é ╨▓╨╕╨┤╨╜╤ï ╨▓ ╨┐╤Ç╨╛╤ä╨╕╨╗╨╡",
    en: "Highlights won't be visible in profile",
  },
  hideCollections: { uz: "Post ro'yxatlarni yashirish", ru: "╨í╨║╤Ç╤ï╤é╤î ╨┐╨╛╨┤╨▒╨╛╤Ç╨║╨╕", en: "Hide collections" },
  hideCollectionsDesc: {
    uz: "To'plamlarni yashirish",
    ru: "╨ƒ╨╛╨┤╨▒╨╛╤Ç╨║╨╕ ╨╜╨╡ ╨▒╤â╨┤╤â╤é ╨▓╨╕╨┤╨╜╤ï ╨┤╤Ç╤â╨│╨╕╨╝",
    en: "Collections won't be visible to others",
  },
  hideMentions: { uz: "Belgilangan postlarni yashirish", ru: "╨í╨║╤Ç╤ï╤é╤î ╤â╨┐╨╛╨╝╨╕╨╜╨░╨╜╨╕╤Å", en: "Hide mentions" },
  hideMentionsDesc: {
    uz: "Eslatmalarni yashirish",
    ru: "╨ú╨┐╨╛╨╝╨╕╨╜╨░╨╜╨╕╤Å ╨╜╨╡ ╨▒╤â╨┤╤â╤é ╨▓╨╕╨┤╨╜╤ï ╨▓ ╨┐╤Ç╨╛╤ä╨╕╨╗╨╡",
    en: "Mentions won't be visible in profile",
  },
  hideSaved: { uz: "Saqlangan postlarni yashirish", ru: "╨í╨║╤Ç╤ï╤é╤î ╤ü╨╛╤à╤Ç╨░╨╜╤æ╨╜╨╜╤ï╨╡", en: "Hide saved posts" },
  hideSavedDesc: {
    uz: "Profildan saqlanganlar ko'rinmasin",
    ru: "╨í╨╛╤à╤Ç╨░╨╜╤æ╨╜╨╜╤ï╨╡ ╨┐╨╛╤ü╤é╤ï ╨╜╨╡ ╨▒╤â╨┤╤â╤é ╨▓╨╕╨┤╨╜╤ï ╨▓ ╨┐╤Ç╨╛╤ä╨╕╨╗╨╡",
    en: "Saved posts won't be visible in profile",
  },

  // Auth
  welcome: { uz: "Xush kelibsiz!", ru: "╨ö╨╛╨▒╤Ç╨╛ ╨┐╨╛╨╢╨░╨╗╨╛╨▓╨░╤é╤î!", en: "Welcome!" },
  login: { uz: "KIRISH", ru: "╨Æ╨₧╨Ö╨ó╨ÿ", en: "LOG IN" },
  loggingIn: { uz: "Kirilmoqda...", ru: "╨Æ╤à╨╛╨┤...", en: "Logging in..." },
  or: { uz: "yoki", ru: "╨╕╨╗╨╕", en: "or" },
  noAccount: { uz: "Akkauntingiz yo'qmi?", ru: "╨¥╨╡╤é ╨░╨║╨║╨░╤â╨╜╤é╨░?", en: "No account?" },
  register: { uz: "Ro'yxatdan o'ting", ru: "╨á╨╡╨│╨╕╤ü╤é╤Ç╨░╤å╨╕╤Å", en: "Sign up" },
  haveAccount: { uz: "Akkauntingiz bormi?", ru: "╨ò╤ü╤é╤î ╨░╨║╨║╨░╤â╨╜╤é?", en: "Have account?" },
  signIn: { uz: "Kirish", ru: "╨Æ╨╛╨╣╤é╨╕", en: "Sign in" },
  hello: { uz: "Salom!", ru: "╨ƒ╤Ç╨╕╨▓╨╡╤é!", en: "Hello!" },
  landingH1: {
    uz: "Avlodona",
    ru: "Avlodona",
    en: "Avlodona",
  },
  landingTagline: {
    uz: "Oila daraxti va raqamli xotira",
    ru: "╨í╨╡╨╝╨╡╨╣╨╜╨╛╨╡ ╨┤╤Ç╨╡╨▓╨╛ ╨╕ ╤å╨╕╤ä╤Ç╨╛╨▓╨░╤Å ╨┐╨░╨╝╤Å╤é╤î",
    en: "Family tree and digital memory",
  },
  createAccount: { uz: "Yangi akkaunt yarating", ru: "╨í╨╛╨╖╨┤╨░╨╣╤é╨╡ ╨░╨║╨║╨░╤â╨╜╤é", en: "Create an account" },
  username: { uz: "Ism va Familiya", ru: "╨ÿ╨╝╤Å ╨╕ ╨ñ╨░╨╝╨╕╨╗╨╕╤Å", en: "Full Name" },
  nameOptional: { uz: "Ismingiz (ixtiyoriy)", ru: "╨Æ╨░╤ê╨╡ ╨╕╨╝╤Å (╨╜╨╡╨╛╨▒╤Å╨╖╨░╤é╨╡╨╗╤î╨╜╨╛)", en: "Your name (optional)" },
  userHandle: { uz: "Foydalanuvchi nomi", ru: "╨ÿ╨╝╤Å ╨┐╨╛╨╗╤î╨╖╨╛╨▓╨░╤é╨╡╨╗╤Å", en: "Username" },
  password: { uz: "Parol", ru: "╨ƒ╨░╤Ç╨╛╨╗╤î", en: "Password" },
  signup: { uz: "RO'YXATDAN O'TISH", ru: "╨á╨ò╨ô╨ÿ╨í╨ó╨á╨É╨ª╨ÿ╨»", en: "SIGN UP" },
  signingUp: { uz: "Ro'yxatdan o'tilmoqda...", ru: "╨á╨╡╨│╨╕╤ü╤é╤Ç╨░╤å╨╕╤Å...", en: "Signing up..." },
  genderOptional: { uz: "Jins (ixtiyoriy)", ru: "╨ƒ╨╛╨╗ (╨╜╨╡╨╛╨▒╤Å╨╖.)", en: "Gender (optional)" },
  male: { uz: "Erkak", ru: "╨£╤â╨╢.", en: "Male" },
  female: { uz: "Ayol", ru: "╨û╨╡╨╜.", en: "Female" },
  socialSignup: { uz: "Ijtimoiy tarmoq orqali", ru: "╨º╨╡╤Ç╨╡╨╖ ╤ü╨╛╤å. ╤ü╨╡╤é╤î", en: "Via social network" },
  comingSoon: {
    uz: "google va telifon tez orada ishlaydi",
    ru: "Google ╨╕ ╤é╨╡╨╗╨╡╤ä╨╛╨╜ ╤ü╨║╨╛╤Ç╨╛ ╨╖╨░╤Ç╨░╨▒╨╛╤é╨░╤Ä╤é",

  },
  error: { uz: "Xato", ru: "╨₧╤ê╨╕╨▒╨║╨░", en: "Error" },
  fillAllFields: { uz: "Barcha maydonlarni to'ldiring", ru: "╨ù╨░╨┐╨╛╨╗╨╜╨╕╤é╨╡ ╨▓╤ü╨╡ ╨┐╨╛╨╗╤Å", en: "Fill all fields" },
  enterEmailPass: { uz: "Email va parolni kiriting", ru: "╨Æ╨▓╨╡╨┤╨╕╤é╨╡ email ╨╕ ╨┐╨░╤Ç╨╛╨╗╤î", en: "Enter email and password" },
  passMinLength: {
    uz: "Parol kamida 6 ta belgidan iborat bo'lishi kerak",
    ru: "╨£╨╕╨╜╨╕╨╝╤â╨╝ 6 ╤ü╨╕╨╝╨▓╨╛╨╗╨╛╨▓",
    en: "Min 6 characters",
  },
  success: { uz: "Muvaffaqiyatli!", ru: "╨ú╤ü╨┐╨╡╤ê╨╜╨╛!", en: "Success!" },
  loggedInMsg: { uz: "Tizimga kirdingiz", ru: "╨Æ╤ï ╨▓╨╛╤ê╨╗╨╕", en: "Logged in" },
  registeredMsg: { uz: "Ro'yxatdan o'tdingiz", ru: "╨Æ╤ï ╨╖╨░╤Ç╨╡╨│╨╕╤ü╤é╤Ç╨╕╤Ç╨╛╨▓╨░╨╗╨╕╤ü╤î", en: "Registered" },
  settingsUpdated: { uz: "Sozlamalar yangilandi", ru: "╨¥╨░╤ü╤é╤Ç╨╛╨╣╨║╨╕ ╨╛╨▒╨╜╨╛╨▓╨╗╨╡╨╜╤ï", en: "Settings updated" },
  settingsUpdateError: {
    uz: "Sozlamalarni yangilashda xatolik yuz berdi",
    ru: "╨₧╤ê╨╕╨▒╨║╨░ ╨┐╤Ç╨╕ ╨╛╨▒╨╜╨╛╨▓╨╗╨╡╨╜╨╕╨╕ ╨╜╨░╤ü╤é╤Ç╨╛╨╡╨║",
    en: "Error updating settings",
  },
  loginError: { uz: "Tizimga kirishda xato", ru: "╨₧╤ê╨╕╨▒╨║╨░ ╨▓╤à╨╛╨┤╨░", en: "Login error" },
  signupError: { uz: "Ro'yxatdan o'tishda xato", ru: "╨₧╤ê╨╕╨▒╨║╨░ ╤Ç╨╡╨│╨╕╤ü╤é╤Ç╨░╤å╨╕╨╕", en: "Signup error" },
  googleError: { uz: "Google bilan kirishda xato", ru: "╨₧╤ê╨╕╨▒╨║╨░ ╨▓╤à╨╛╨┤╨░ ╤ç╨╡╤Ç╨╡╨╖ Google", en: "Google login error" },

  // Bottom nav
  home: { uz: "Bugun", ru: "╨ô╨╗╨░╨▓╨╜╨░╤Å", en: "Home" },
  relativesNav: { uz: "Qarindosh", ru: "╨á╨╛╨┤╨╜╤ï╨╡", en: "Family" },
  addNav: { uz: "Yaratish", ru: "╨í╨╛╨╖╨┤╨░╤é╤î", en: "Create" },
  messagesNav: { uz: "Xabarlar", ru: "╨º╨░╤é╤ï", en: "Messages" },
  profileNav: { uz: "Profil", ru: "╨ƒ╤Ç╨╛╤ä╨╕╨╗╤î", en: "Profile" },

  // Messages page
  messages: { uz: "Xabarlar", ru: "╨í╨╛╨╛╨▒╤ë╨╡╨╜╨╕╤Å", en: "Messages" },
  searchChats: { uz: "Qidirish...", ru: "╨ƒ╨╛╨╕╤ü╨║...", en: "Search..." },
  allChats: { uz: "Barcha", ru: "╨Æ╤ü╨╡", en: "All" },

type TranslationKey = keyof typeof translations;

interface LanguageContextType {
  lang: Language;
  setLang: (lang: Language) => void;
  t: (key: TranslationKey) => string;
}

const LanguageContext = createContext<LanguageContextType | undefined>(undefined);

export const LanguageProvider: React.FC<{ children: React.ReactNode }> = ({ children }) => {
  const [lang, setLang] = useLocalStorage<Language>("app-language", "uz");

  const t = (key: TranslationKey): string => {
    return translations[key]?.[lang] || translations[key]?.["uz"] || key;
  };

  return <LanguageContext.Provider value={{ lang, setLang, t }}>{children}</LanguageContext.Provider>;
};

export const useLanguage = () => {
  const context = useContext(LanguageContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error("useLanguage must be used within LanguageProvider");
  return context;
};
